'''poyanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:uwu|uwu]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uwu|uwu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| poyanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyanithi|poyanithi]] || [[word:poyaniji|poyaniji]] || [[word:poyanishi|poyanishi]] || [[word:poyaniki|poyaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyanuthuthu|poyanuthuthu]] || [[word:poyanujuju|poyanujuju]] || [[word:poyanushushu|poyanushushu]] || [[word:poyanukuku|poyanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyanuthu|poyanuthu]] || [[word:poyanuju|poyanuju]] || [[word:poyanushu|poyanushu]] || [[word:poyanuku|poyanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyanufthuf|poyanufthuf]] || [[word:poyanufjuf|poyanufjuf]] || [[word:poyanufshuf|poyanufshuf]] || [[word:poyanufkuf|poyanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyanethe|poyanethe]] || [[word:poyaneje|poyaneje]] || [[word:poyaneshe|poyaneshe]] || [[word:poyaneke|poyaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyanothotho|poyanothotho]] || [[word:poyanojojo|poyanojojo]] || [[word:poyanoshosho|poyanoshosho]] || [[word:poyanokoko|poyanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyanotho|poyanotho]] || [[word:poyanojo|poyanojo]] || [[word:poyanosho|poyanosho]] || [[word:poyanoko|poyanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyanofthof|poyanofthof]] || [[word:poyanofjof|poyanofjof]] || [[word:poyanofshof|poyanofshof]] || [[word:poyanofkof|poyanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfthĂŻf|poyanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfjĂŻf|poyanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfshĂŻf|poyanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfkĂŻf|poyanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|poyanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|poyanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|poyanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|poyanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfthĂŻf|poyanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfjĂŻf|poyanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfshĂŻf|poyanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfkĂŻf|poyanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfthĂŻf|poyanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfjĂŻf|poyanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfshĂŻf|poyanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:poyanĂŻfkĂŻf|poyanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:poyanĂŠthĂŠ|poyanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:poyanĂŠjĂŠ|poyanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:poyanĂŠshĂŠ|poyanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:poyanĂŠkĂŠ|poyanĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:poyanathatha|poyanathatha]] || [[word:poyanajaja|poyanajaja]] || [[word:poyanashasha|poyanashasha]] || [[word:poyanakaka|poyanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:poyanatha|poyanatha]] || [[word:poyanaja|poyanaja]] || [[word:poyanasha|poyanasha]] || [[word:poyanaka|poyanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:poyanafthaf|poyanafthaf]] || [[word:poyanafjaf|poyanafjaf]] || [[word:poyanafshaf|poyanafshaf]] || [[word:poyanafkaf|poyanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:poyanasha|poyanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:poyanshĂ«asha|poyanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:poyanroasha|poyanroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:poyanmuasha|poyanmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:poyanyaasha|poyanyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopoyannkshĂ«asha|gopoyannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopoyannkroasha|gopoyannkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopoyannkmuasha|gopoyannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopoyannkyaasha|gopoyannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:poyayanasha|poyayanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:poyayanshĂ«asha|poyayanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:poyayanroasha|poyayanroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:poyayanmuasha|poyayanmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:poyayanyaasha|poyayanyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopoyayannkshĂ«asha|gopoyayannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopoyayannkroasha|gopoyayannkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopoyayannkmuasha|gopoyayannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopoyayannkyaasha|gopoyayannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:peyĂŠnasha|peyĂŠnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:peyĂŠnshĂ«asha|peyĂŠnshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:peyĂŠnroasha|peyĂŠnroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:peyĂŠnmuasha|peyĂŠnmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:peyĂŠnyaasha|peyĂŠnyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopeyĂŠnnkshĂ«asha|gopeyĂŠnnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopeyĂŠnnkroasha|gopeyĂŠnnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopeyĂŠnnkmuasha|gopeyĂŠnnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopeyĂŠnnkyaasha|gopeyĂŠnnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:poyfanasha|poyfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:poyfanshĂ«asha|poyfanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:poyfanroasha|poyfanroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:poyfanmuasha|poyfanmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:poyfanyaasha|poyfanyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopoyfannkshĂ«asha|gopoyfannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopoyfannkroasha|gopoyfannkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopoyfannkmuasha|gopoyfannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopoyfannkyaasha|gopoyfannkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
